records.ety: [OF. cruelt, F. cruaut, fr. L. crudelitas, fr. crudelis. See Cruel.]

defs: The attribute or quality of being cruel; a disposition to give unnecessary pain or suffering to others; inhumanity; barbarity.
quotes: Pierced through the heart with your stern cruelty.

defs: A cruel and barbarous deed; inhuman treatment; the act of willfully causing unnecessary pain.
quotes: Cruelties worthy of the dungeons of the Inquisition.
